rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.006 governs student removal to disciplinary alternative education programs and has no relation to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 37.006. REMOVAL FOR CERTAIN CONDUCT. (a) Subject to the requirements of Section 37.009(a), a student shall be removed from class and placed in a disciplinary alternative education program as provided by Section 37.008 if the student:
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed tax change.
